features: Upgraded camera cover: With our magnetic-repulsion camera cover, lens protection is stronger and sliding is smoother than ever. Just one quick flick and the cover slides shut, and you can focus on chasing new horizons without anything holding you back.

Durable kickstand: Whether it’s a lakeside video call or an impromptu movie under the stars, our foldable kickstand lets you enjoy hands-free freedom wherever your journey takes you, letting you share, connect, and create memories all with rock-solid stability.

2 front-frame options: Choose the built-in PET screen protector for all-around defense against scratches and dust, or swap to the extra front frame when you want a bare-screen experience. Every journey, every choice—Dexnor adapts to the way you explore.

Military-grade drop protection: Hit the road with confidence! This bumper case delivers military-grade protection that stands up to shocks and impacts. For those who rise to every challenge, this is more than just a case—it’s your new adventure sidekick.

Exclusive compatibility: Designed exclusively for the Samsung Galaxy A16, this rugged case fits your phone like a glove. Whether you’re traveling through cityscapes or exploring wild trails, your phone stays protected and ready for any adventure.
